title: Matera ranked as one of the fastest growing fintechs
excerpt: Digital world recently highlighted Matera as one of the fastest growing fintechs.
body: Digital world recently highlighted Matera as one of the fastest growing fintechs. [Read here.](https://palavradigital.wordpress.com/2022/08/08/empresas-brasileiras-sao-destaque-no-ranking-da-fintech-energy-como-as-que-mais-crescem/)
